meaning: 浼婃柉鍏板牎(宸村熀鏂潶棣栭兘)
examples: VOA recently visited the school in the capital Islamabad.
"There is no danger of war," Musharraf told reporters in the Pakistani capital of Islamabad.
A group in Islamabad reports Pakistan spends less on education than any other country in South Asia.
Sharif intended to drive through the country from Islamabad to Lahaur, his home city, in a convoy.
The former president, who led Pakistan for nine years, is currently under house arrest in Islamabad.
